name: Audit Trails Enabled for CDE Systems
description: Ensures audit trails are enabled and link all access to individual users (PCI DSS 10.1)
query: SELECT id, hostname, audit_logging_enabled, audit_user_tracking FROM systems WHERE cde_scope = true AND (audit_logging_enabled = false OR audit_user_tracking = false)
remediation: Enable comprehensive audit logging on all CDE systems. Ensure all actions can be traced to individual users.
